title: potential ET 4L candidates:
content:
potential ET 4L candidates:
Manett (https://manett.bandcamp.com)

showed a conscious effort to improve in weak areas


im selling a lifestyle of openness and freedom and exploration
im selling myself art music writing design
ideas
i am my product
become the best me

my ultimate (long term) goal is to have a online presence that cuts out publishing companies, record labels...from artist directly to fan
subscription
all of MY work (writing, music, and design) will be available through my site and the money will go right to me
short term goal: build an online portfolio of all my complete and presentable artistic endeavors

i wanna build my own platform, where i host and curate artists and you must come to our destination to do so and actively participate with the artist
make true fans
and friends

be ET CETER4 (the brand)
use etc.com as my base for all my work
